phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Kings Chapel
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela dos Reis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH RAYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Houses tombs of Portugal's first kings.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Capela dos Reis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH RAYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Kings Chapel.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Kings Chapel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH RAYSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Capela dos Reis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay tower donation
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa de donativos da torre?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah KAH-shah jee-doh-NA-tee-voo dah-TOH-hee

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à entrada da torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH TAW-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the tower entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the tower entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH TAW-rih.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto à entrada da torre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Kings Chapel
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Capela dos Reis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH RAYSH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia oficial da Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DUH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the official guide of the cathedral.

responses.english: Ask the official guide of the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DUH SEH.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia oficial da Sé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay tower donation
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de donativos para a torre?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH doo-nuh-TEE-voosh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih?
phrases.cultural_note: O donativo contribui para a manutenção da torre sineira.

phrases.text_local: Olá, onde posso alugar um audioguia?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR OONNG ow-deeoo-GEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Audioguides are available at the main entrance. Please return them before exiting the cathedral.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Onde devo validar o meu bilhete para a catedral ou museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih PUH-ruh AH kuh-tihd-RAHL OHW moo-ZEHOO?

likely_response.local: Na bilheteira ou com o zelador do claustro.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW KOHM AW zeh-luh-DOHR DOO KLOWSHT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office or with the cloister caretaker.

responses.english: At the ticket office or with the cloister caretaker.
responses.phonetic: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW KOHM AW zeh-luh-DOHR DOO KLOWSHT-roo.
responses.french: Na bilheteira ou com o zelador do claustro.
